summary:
The summary must be exactly two sentences long and contain only clinically significant information related to the original query about cabozantinib effectiveness in hepatic cancer.

Cabozantinib demonstrates clinical efficacy in advanced hepatocellular carcinoma as a second-line therapeutic option following disease progression after sorafenib. It is supported by major oncology guidelines and officially indicated for use post-sorafenib failure, positioning it within validated retreatment strategies for HCC.

Clinically focused  

Correct Summary: Cabozantinib is an efficacious second-line treatment for advanced hepatocellular carcinoma after progressive disease on sorafenib. Its approval and integration into global treatment standards validate its role in managing refractory HCC.
